title: Fantômas contre Fantômas
writer: Marcel Allain, Pierre Laroche, Solange Térac
actors: Marcelle Chantal, Aimé Clariond, Alexandre Rignault
plot: Everyone in Paris thinks Fantomas is dead. A wave of extortion, blackmail and murder all point to the master criminal. Inspector Juve and his reporter friend Fandor set out to find the truth.
